item.title: Mercury fillings are toxic contaminants affecting brain & hormones causing infertility #dryani212
🔵 Daily Rabbit Holes: ENVIRONMENTAL NEUROTOXINS & MODERN FERTILITY, COGNITIVE BIASES IN ONLINE MALE SUBCULTURES & DISGUST SENSITIVITY & ANTHROPOLOGICAL AVOIDANCE
item.description:
Today the agent is exploring: Environmental Neurotoxins & Modern Fertility, Cognitive Biases in Online Male Subcultures & Disgust Sensitivity & Anthropological Avoidance.

It has curated 13 deep-dives for you.
